overall.description: A first-person walk through a foggy cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, industrial architecture, and towering buildings with holographic advertisements. The footage appears to be from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing ray-traced lighting and atmospheric fog effects as the camera navigates sidewalks and intersections.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with concrete barriers and crosswalk

events.description: silver van drives past from left to right across the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk approaching a street corner with red neon lights visible on the building ahead

notable_agents.action: silver van driving across the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with metal fencing on top running along the right side of the sidewalk
tall street lamp with bright white light illuminating the foggy air
large industrial building with red neon accent lights on the roof structure
zebra crossing with white painted stripes on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy night street corner with concrete barriers lining the right side. The camera walks forward along the sidewalk as a silver van passes by on the left. Red neon lights glow atop a distant industrial building, and street lamps cast bright halos in the hazy air.

events.description: camera tilts upward to focus on the tall industrial tower with bright spotlights
camera tilts back down to street level

agents.ego_description: stopping to look up at the massive industrial tower, examining its structure and lighting against the night sky

entered.detail: massive dark industrial tower with bright white spotlights near the top and scaffolding structure
large yellow steel truss structure supporting overhead equipment or transit lines

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts dramatically upward to reveal a massive industrial tower piercing the foggy night sky, illuminated by bright spotlights. A yellow steel crane structure frames the right side of the shot. The camera holds this upward gaze for several seconds before tilting back down to street level.

events.description: black car drives past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past industrial buildings and power substations, heading toward an intersection

notable_agents.action: person walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk

entered.detail: low-rise industrial building with beige and dark green facade and narrow windows
dense network of electrical wires and transmission towers stretching across the street
tall palm tree silhouetted against the foggy sky
green street sign reading 'Santa Rosa' mounted on a pole

segments.scene_description: Walking along an industrial street lined with power lines and transmission towers. A palm tree stands on the right near a low industrial building. The camera approaches an intersection marked by a green 'Santa Rosa' street sign while vehicles pass by on the road.

events.description: turning left at the intersection to follow the street
blue vintage-style car drives past from left to right

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and continuing to walk along the street, passing under an overpass

notable_agents.action: blue car with headlights on driving past the camera

entered.detail: large vertical holographic advertisement displaying a woman with green background and 'Pachinko' text
massive elevated highway or transit structure running perpendicular to the street

segments.scene_description: Navigating a busy commercial intersection with a massive green holographic billboard dominating the view. The camera turns left and walks under an elevated overpass structure. Various vehicles including a distinctive blue car drive past, while pedestrians walk along the sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under overpass with building entrance

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass into a more enclosed area, approaching a building entrance with large holographic displays

entered.detail: modern building entrance with illuminated doorway and geometric architectural elements
bright yellow and white vending machine or kiosk near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive overpass into a semi-covered urban space. The area features a building entrance with bright illuminated signage and vending machines. The overpass structure now looms directly overhead, blocking most of the sky, while the camera approaches the building facade with its geometric architectural details.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a foggy industrial district that gradually transitions into a dense, neon-lit commercial hub. It begins on a hazy street corner lined with concrete barriers, moving forward past a silver van as red neon glows atop distant buildings. The camera then tilts dramatically upward to reveal a massive industrial tower and a yellow steel crane piercing the night sky before returning to street level to pass by transmission towers and a solitary palm tree. As the camera reaches a green street sign at an intersection, the environment opens up into a busy commercial zone dominated by a massive green holographic billboard. Finally, the view shifts left to move beneath a heavy elevated overpass, transitioning from the open road into a semi-covered urban space filled with vending machines and illuminated building facades.
